zh.lifeSummary: 當Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr於大約1175年出生時，他的父親Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn31歲，母親Mawd verch Grufford23歲。他與Angharad verch Lewys在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr于大约1175年出生时，他的父亲Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn31岁，母亲Mawd verch Grufford23岁。他与Angharad verch Lewys在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根拉迪爾。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

en.lifeSummary: When Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr was born about 1175, his father, Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn, was 31 and his mother, Mawd verch Grufford, was 23. He married Angharad verch Lewys in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. He died in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr est né environ 1175, son père, Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mawd verch Grufford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Angharad verch Lewys à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé à Radyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr um 1175 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn 31 und seine Mutter Mawd verch Grufford 23. Er hat in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales Angharad verch Lewys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr è nato il circa 1175, il suo padre, Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mawd verch Grufford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Angharad verch Lewys nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyrが約1175年に生まれた時，父Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelynは31歳，母Mawd verch Gruffordは23歳であった。ウェールズグラモーガンラディルでAngharad verch Lewysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズグラモーガンラディルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr(이)가 대략 1175년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mawd verch Grufford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 Angharad verch Lewys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr nasceu aproximadamente 1175, seu pai, Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mawd verch Grufford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad verch Lewys em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr родился около 1175 г., его отцу по имени Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mawd verch Grufford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad verch Lewys в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr nació aproximadamente 1175, su papá, Hywel "Goch" ap Llywelyn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mawd verch Grufford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Angharad verch Lewys en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
